name: cosmic-merger
description: A lightweight Electron app to merge video and audio files using FFmpeg

scripts.electron-dev: npm run compile-main && concurrently "npm run dev" "tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --watch" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron dist-electron/main.js --no-sandbox"
scripts.build-electron: npm run build && npm run compile-main && electron dist-electron/main.js --no-sandbox
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run compile-main && electron-builder
